message:
feat(sqlmodel): Add Session and SessionBuilder with console integration

Introduce Session abstraction that combines connection management with
optional console output capabilities:

- Session<C> wraps any Connection type with optional console support
- SessionBuilder provides fluent API for building sessions:
  - with_console() for explicit console attachment
  - with_shared_console() for sharing console across sessions
  - with_auto_console() for auto-detected output mode
- ConnectionBuilderExt trait for driver-specific builder extensions
- All console features properly gated behind #[cfg(feature = "console")]
- 10 unit tests covering all functionality

Closes: bd-28n

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
